releases.label: 4 Ms CDF-S catalog
releases.summary: Main catalog from the 4 Ms CDF-S exposure (Xue et al. 2011), then the deepest Chandra survey: 740 X-ray point sources over 464.5 arcmin2, selected with wavdetect + binomial P < 0.004 in three bands; 300 sources new vs. the 2 Ms catalog, ~97% multiwavelength-ID rate, >75% AGN; plus a 36-source supplementary catalog. Superseded by the 7 Ms catalogs.

releases.label: 7 Ms CDF-S catalog
releases.summary: Source catalogs for the full ~7 Ms CDF-S exposure (Luo et al. 2017) — the deepest X-ray survey ever performed (102 observations, 1999-2016), covering 484.2 arcmin2: main catalog of 1,008 sources (291 new vs. 4 Ms) plus 47 supplementary NIR-bright sources; 98.4% multiwavelength-ID rate, 986 redshifts (653 spectroscopic), 711 AGNs; central ~1 arcmin2 flux limits ~1.9e-17 / 6.4e-18 / 2.7e-17 erg/cm2/s (full/soft/hard band). HEASARC table CHANDFS7MS.
